overview: A bold multi-page lifestyle brand shopping site fusing Indian folk/Mughal, Japanese, Mexican, African, and vintage Americana aesthetics with streetwear and graffiti energy. Features a dual theme toggle — Be Funky for bold saturated energy and Chic Look for timeless refinement — both rooted in the same cultural fusion DNA.
features: Dual theme toggle: Be Funky (bold/saturated) and Chic Look (timeless/refined), saved in browser
Homepage with hero section, brand tagline, and featured aesthetic showcase
Brand Story page narrating the five-culture fusion with decorative motifs
Product Lookbook with 12 placeholder items, category filtering, and hover effects
Newsletter signup with platform email confirmation
Cultural design palette: saffron, indigo, crimson, off-white with block print / paisley / mandala motifs
